description: Connect to Braintree (PayPal) to sync payment transactions, customers, subscriptions, plans, and disputes.

install_fields.label: Merchant ID
install_fields.help: Your Braintree Merchant ID, found in the Braintree Control Panel under Account > My User > API Keys.

install_fields.label: Public Key
install_fields.help: Your Braintree API Public Key. Used as the username for HTTP Basic Auth.

install_fields.label: Private Key
install_fields.help: Your Braintree API Private Key. Used as the password for HTTP Basic Auth. Keep this secret.

install_fields.label: Environment
install_fields.help: Use 'sandbox' for testing and 'production' for live transactions.

resources.name: transactions
resources.description: Payment transactions including amount, status, currency, and customer info.

resources.name: customers
resources.description: Customer records with contact details and payment methods.

resources.name: subscriptions
resources.description: Recurring billing subscriptions linked to plans.

resources.name: plans
resources.description: Billing plans defining pricing and billing frequency.
